headline: Tang Dynasty
description: Tang Dynasty (618-907 CE) is considered China's golden age — political stability, economic prosperity, cultural flowering. Capital Chang'an (modern Xi'an) was the world's largest city (~1 million). Silk Road trade flourished. Poetry (Li Bai, Du Fu), Buddhism, and the imperial examination system reached their peaks.

citation.name: China's Golden Age: Everyday Life in the Tang Dynasty (Charles Benn)
China's Cosmopolitan Empire: The Tang Dynasty (2025)
citation.author: Lewis M.E.

citation.name: The Tang Dynasty: A Global History (2025)
citation.author: multiple
